title: Jupyter Notebook Comment and Review System
description: Configuration schema for collaborative comment and review system in Jupyter Notebook v7 with real-time synchronization, threaded discussions, and review workflow management

commentThreading.title: Comment Threading Configuration
commentThreading.description: Settings for comment thread behavior and hierarchy

enableThreadCollapse.title: Enable Thread Collapse
enableThreadCollapse.description: Allow collapsing and expanding comment threads

showThreadIndicators.title: Show Thread Indicators
showThreadIndicators.description: Display visual indicators for threaded comment hierarchy

defaultThreadState.title: Default Thread State
defaultThreadState.description: Initial display state for comment threads

threadSortOrder.title: Thread Sort Order
threadSortOrder.description: Default sorting order for comments within threads

enableNotifications.title: Enable Notifications
enableNotifications.description: Enable real-time notifications for comment activities

notifyOnNewComment.title: Notify on New Comment
notifyOnNewComment.description: Send notifications when new comments are added

notifyOnReply.title: Notify on Reply
notifyOnReply.description: Send notifications when someone replies to your comment

notifyOnResolve.title: Notify on Resolve
notifyOnResolve.description: Send notifications when comments are resolved or unresolved

notifyOnMention.title: Notify on Mention
notifyOnMention.description: Send notifications when you are mentioned in a comment

notificationDelay.title: Notification Delay (ms)
notificationDelay.description: Delay before showing notifications to prevent spam (default: 1000ms)

showDesktopNotifications.title: Show Desktop Notifications
showDesktopNotifications.description: Display browser desktop notifications for comments

soundNotifications.title: Sound Notifications
soundNotifications.description: Play sound alerts for comment notifications

reviewWorkflow.title: Review Workflow Configuration
reviewWorkflow.description: Settings for comment review and resolution workflow

enableReviewMode.title: Enable Review Mode
enableReviewMode.description: Enable structured review workflow with approval states

autoResolveTimeout.title: Auto-Resolve Timeout (ms)
autoResolveTimeout.description: Automatically resolve comments after specified timeout (0 to disable)

requireResolutionPermission.title: Require Resolution Permission
requireResolutionPermission.description: Require specific permission to resolve comments

showResolvedComments.title: Show Resolved Comments
showResolvedComments.description: Display resolved comments in the interface

resolvedCommentOpacity.title: Resolved Comment Opacity
resolvedCommentOpacity.description: Visual opacity for resolved comments (0.0 to 1.0)

enableCommentStatus.title: Enable Comment Status
enableCommentStatus.description: Enable status tracking for comments (draft, active, resolved, deleted)

discussionManagement.title: Discussion Management Settings
discussionManagement.description: Configuration for comment organization and management

pageSize.title: Page Size
pageSize.description: Number of comments to display per page

maxCommentLength.title: Maximum Comment Length
maxCommentLength.description: Maximum number of characters allowed in a comment

defaultFilter.title: Default Filter
defaultFilter.description: Default filter applied to comment display

enableCommentExport.title: Enable Comment Export
enableCommentExport.description: Allow exporting comments to JSON format

enableCommentImport.title: Enable Comment Import
enableCommentImport.description: Allow importing comments from JSON format

showCommentCount.title: Show Comment Count
showCommentCount.description: Display total comment count in the interface

showAuthorAvatars.title: Show Author Avatars
showAuthorAvatars.description: Display user avatars in comment threads

displaySettings.title: Comment Display Settings
displaySettings.description: Visual appearance and layout configuration for comments

enableMarkdownRendering.title: Enable Markdown Rendering
enableMarkdownRendering.description: Render markdown formatting in comment content

allowedMarkdownFeatures.title: Allowed Markdown Features
allowedMarkdownFeatures.description: Markdown features enabled in comment content

isDockable.title: Dockable Comment Panel
isDockable.description: Allow docking comment panel as sidebar

enableSyntaxHighlighting.title: Enable Syntax Highlighting
enableSyntaxHighlighting.description: Enable syntax highlighting in code blocks within comments

enableRealtimeSync.title: Enable Real-time Sync
enableRealtimeSync.description: Enable real-time synchronization of comments across clients

syncInterval.title: Sync Interval (ms)
syncInterval.description: Interval for synchronization updates (default: 100ms for <200ms requirement)

enableOfflineMode.title: Enable Offline Mode
enableOfflineMode.description: Allow commenting in offline mode with sync on reconnection

connectionRetryAttempts.title: Connection Retry Attempts
connectionRetryAttempts.description: Number of retry attempts for connection failures

accessControl.title: Access Control Settings
accessControl.description: Permission and access control configuration for comments

enablePermissions.title: Enable Permissions
enablePermissions.description: Enable permission-based access control for comments

allowGuestComments.title: Allow Guest Comments
allowGuestComments.description: Allow unauthenticated users to create comments

requireApprovalForGuests.title: Require Approval for Guest Comments
requireApprovalForGuests.description: Require approval for comments from guest users

enableCommentModerationQueue.title: Enable Comment Moderation Queue
enableCommentModerationQueue.description: Enable moderation queue for comment approval

autoApproveFromTrustedUsers.title: Auto-approve from Trusted Users
autoApproveFromTrustedUsers.description: Automatically approve comments from trusted users

keyboardShortcuts.title: Keyboard Shortcuts
keyboardShortcuts.description: Keyboard shortcuts for comment system operations

enableKeyboardShortcuts.title: Enable Keyboard Shortcuts
enableKeyboardShortcuts.description: Enable keyboard shortcuts for comment operations

shortcutAddComment.title: Add Comment Shortcut
shortcutAddComment.description: Keyboard shortcut to add a comment

shortcutResolveComment.title: Resolve Comment Shortcut
shortcutResolveComment.description: Keyboard shortcut to resolve a comment

shortcutToggleCommentPanel.title: Toggle Comment Panel Shortcut
shortcutToggleCommentPanel.description: Keyboard shortcut to toggle comment panel

shortcutNextComment.title: Next Comment Shortcut
shortcutNextComment.description: Keyboard shortcut to navigate to next comment

shortcutPreviousComment.title: Previous Comment Shortcut
shortcutPreviousComment.description: Keyboard shortcut to navigate to previous comment

performance.title: Performance Settings
performance.description: Performance optimization settings for comment system

enableVirtualization.title: Enable Virtualization
enableVirtualization.description: Enable virtual scrolling for large comment lists

commentRenderThreshold.title: Comment Render Threshold
commentRenderThreshold.description: Minimum number of comments before enabling virtualization

cacheExpiration.title: Cache Expiration (ms)
cacheExpiration.description: Cache expiration time for comment data
